Hero.badge: MjekOn: #1 Medical Clinic in the Region
Hero.description: Experience the future of medicine with MjekOn. Our world-class specialists and modern technology offer personalized care.

HowItWorks.subtitle: No registration required. Find and book a specialist in minutes.
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Type a specialty or symptom to instantly find the right type of doctor for your needs.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Browse specialists by category and pick the one that fits your schedule and preferences.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Confirm your appointment online in seconds — no phone calls, no waiting.

WhyChooseUs.heading: What makes us different
WhyChooseUs.verified_desc: Every specialist is licensed, credentialed, and reviewed.
WhyChooseUs.booking_desc: Reserve your slot in under 60 seconds, any time of day.
WhyChooseUs.response_desc: See real-time slots and get confirmed appointments instantly.
WhyChooseUs.trusted_desc: HIPAA-compliant, secure, and used by thousands of patients.

Services.desc: Our oncology team combines surgical excellence with compassionate care at every stage of your treatment journey.
Services.s1_desc: Expert oncological resection and reconstruction, guided by precision imaging and minimally invasive techniques.
Services.s2_desc: Laparoscopic and robotic-assisted interventions that reduce recovery time and improve patient comfort.
Services.s3_desc: Structured long-term monitoring plans that give patients confidence and catch recurrence early.
Services.s4_desc: Cross-specialty tumor boards review every case together — surgeons, oncologists, radiologists, and more.

SpecialtyGrid.title: Specialties
SpecialtyGrid.description: Explore our medical specialties and book an appointment with the right doctor for your needs.

BlogSection.desc: Useful information from our specialists to keep you informed and healthy.
BlogSection.a1_title: How to Prepare for Your First Oncology Visit
BlogSection.a1_excerpt: Learn what to expect during your first consultation and how to get the most from your meeting with the specialist.
BlogSection.a2_excerpt: Discover simple, science-based ways to protect your heart health every single day.
BlogSection.a3_title: The Importance of Annual Check-Ups: What You Need to Know
BlogSection.a3_excerpt: Regular health checks can detect problems before they become serious. Here's why you shouldn't skip them.
BlogSection.a4_excerpt: How minimal-access surgical procedures are transforming patient recovery and clinical outcomes.

Testimonials.title: Patient Stories
Testimonials.t1_quote: From the moment I walked in, I felt valued — not just as a diagnosis, but as a person. The team explained every option clearly and let me decide at my own pace.
Testimonials.t2_quote: The aftercare was exceptional. Even after the treatment ended, I knew I always had someone to call. That peace of mind is everything.
Testimonials.t3_quote: I was terrified before my first appointment. The staff made the whole journey manageable. I cannot thank them enough for their compassion and skill.

Footer.description: Providing world-class oncology care with a personal touch. Your health is our priority — from diagnosis to recovery.
Footer.rights: MjekOn Health Group. All medical services are provided by licensed specialists.

Cta.desc: Join thousands of patients who trust MjekOn for expert care.

DoctorSpotlight.title: Meet Our Experts
DoctorSpotlight.desc: Board-certified oncologists and surgeons dedicated to your care.
